entity.name: Willen LLC
entity.description: Willen LLC is a Wyoming, USA company that maintains PHANTOM, an AGPL-3.0-or-later end-to-end encrypted, censorship-resistant messenger. The company exists to develop and steward PHANTOM as public-interest software infrastructure.

projects.name: PHANTOM
projects.description: An open-source, end-to-end encrypted, censorship-resistant messenger production-validated against Russia's TSPU DPI filtering. Built with Kotlin Multiplatform (one codebase across Android, iOS, web), Compose Multiplatform UI, custom Double Ratchet implementation over libsodium, and custom Rust relay server. Currently in Alpha 2 with live production relay in Hetzner Helsinki. Designed for journalists, activists, and dissidents in restricted internet environments.

channels.description: Liberapay is a French non-profit platform for recurring weekly/monthly/yearly micro-donations. Zero platform fee. Donor anonymity by default. Best for FOSS-aligned recurring contributions.
Low-friction one-time and membership donation platform. Accepts credit/debit cards and PayPal. For one-time contributions from blog readers and social audiences.
Bitcoin donations. Native SegWit (P2WPKH) address. Self-custody wallet held by the maintainer.
Monero donations for privacy-aligned contributors. Self-custody wallet held by the maintainer. Subaddress used for public donations.
Ethereum donations. Native ETH only; stablecoins are not accepted. Self-custody wallet held by the maintainer. Address is valid across EVM-compatible networks.

channels.address: Coordinate via legal@phntm.pro for gifts of $10,000 USD equivalent and above.
channels.description: Direct bank wire to Willen LLC's USD operating account. Used for large gifts and grant disbursements, where formal documentation and sanctions screening are coordinated in writing.

plans.name: iOS port hardware unblock
plans.description: Apple Silicon Mac (Mac mini M4) for iOS development on Kotlin Multiplatform. The iOS port is the single binding constraint preventing PHANTOM from being a true cross-platform alternative to centralized messengers.

plans.name: External cryptographic audit
plans.description: Independent third-party audit of the custom Double Ratchet implementation, Sealed Sender envelope construction, X25519 key derivation, and relay protocol against the formal threat model. Scheduled post-Beta, pre-v1.0.

plans.name: 12-month maintainer runway
plans.description: Solo maintainer compensation at below-market open-source rate for 12 months of full-time PHANTOM development. Covers iOS port completion, Beta release, group chat foundation, pluggable censorship-resistant transports, and external audit liaison.

plans.name: Production infrastructure
plans.description: Hetzner Helsinki VPS for production relay, domain registration (phntm.pro), TLS certificates via Let's Encrypt, CI/CD costs, error monitoring, transactional email for security disclosures. EU jurisdiction by design.

plans.name: Legal and compliance baseline
plans.description: Annual minimum required to maintain Willen LLC in good standing: Wyoming registered agent, annual report, federal tax filings via U.S. CPA (Form 5472 + 1120 for foreign-owned single-member LLC), domain registrar, FinCEN BOI filing.
